items.title: Upscale, which is building AI networking infrastructure to rival Cisco, raised a $190M Series A-1 at a $2B valuation, up from $1B after raising $200M in January (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)
items.title_original: Upscale, which is building AI networking infrastructure to rival Cisco, raised a $190M Series A-1 at a $2B valuation, up from $1B after raising $200M in January (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)
items.title_en: Upscale, which is building AI networking infrastructure to rival Cisco, raised a $190M Series A-1 at a $2B valuation, up from $1B after raising $200M in January (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)
items.title_zh: Upscale 正在构建人工智能网络基础设施以与思科竞争，该公司在 1 月份筹集了 2 亿美元后，以 20 亿美元的估值筹集了 1.9 亿美元的 A-1 轮融资，估值高于 10 亿美元（Lily Mae Lazarus/财富）

items.title: S&P and IBM: 22% of global cyberattacks in 2024 hit Japan, the most targeted country, as it scrambles to improve its substandard systems against AI threats (Catherine Thorbecke/Bloomberg)

items.title_en: S&P and IBM: 22% of global cyberattacks in 2024 hit Japan, the most targeted country, as it scrambles to improve its substandard systems against AI threats (Catherine Thorbecke/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 标准普尔和 IBM：2024 年，22% 的全球网络攻击袭击了日本，该国是最受攻击的国家，因为日本正在努力改进其不合格的系统以应对人工智能威胁（Catherine Thorbecke/彭博社）

items.title_original: Satya Nadella says the public wouldn't tolerate a few AI labs "doing all of the learning for the world", as Microsoft moves to provide low-cost models and tools (Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: Satya Nadella says the public wouldn't tolerate a few AI labs "doing all of the learning for the world", as Microsoft moves to provide low-cost models and tools (Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 萨蒂亚·纳德拉 (Satya Nadella) 表示，随着微软转向提供低成本模型和工具，公众不会容忍少数人工智能实验室“为世界完成所有学习”（华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: 萨蒂亚·纳德拉 (Satya Nadella) 表示，随着微软转向提供低成本模型和工具，公众不会容忍少数人工智能实验室“为世界完成所有学习”（华尔街日报） / Satya Nadella says the public wouldn't tolerate a few AI labs "doing all of the learning for the world", as Microsoft moves to provide low-cost models and tools (Wall Street Journal)

items.title: Analysis: Anthropic may have talked itself into an export ban, as its 2026 official statements and posts used AI risk-related terms 8x more often than OpenAI (Clara Murray/Financial Times)
items.title_original: Analysis: Anthropic may have talked itself into an export ban, as its 2026 official statements and posts used AI risk-related terms 8x more often than OpenAI (Clara Murray/Financial Times)
items.title_en: Analysis: Anthropic may have talked itself into an export ban, as its 2026 official statements and posts used AI risk-related terms 8x more often than OpenAI (Clara Murray/Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 分析：Anthropic 可能已经说服自己实施出口禁令，因为其 2026 年官方声明和帖子使用人工智能风险相关术语的频率是 OpenAI 的 8 倍（Clara Murray/金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 分析：Anthropic 可能已经说服自己实施出口禁令，因为其 2026 年官方声明和帖子使用人工智能风险相关术语的频率是 OpenAI 的 8 倍（Clara Murray/金融时报） / Analysis: Anthropic may have talked itself into an export ban, as its 2026 official statements and posts used AI risk-related terms 8x more often than OpenAI (Clara Murray/Financial Times)

items.title: Shenzhen-listed Apple supplier Lingyi iTech seeks to raise $1.1B in a June 26 Hong Kong debut, as the electronic parts maker expands into AI hardware and robots (Iris Deng/South China Morning Post)
items.title_original: Shenzhen-listed Apple supplier Lingyi iTech seeks to raise $1.1B in a June 26 Hong Kong debut, as the electronic parts maker expands into AI hardware and robots (Iris Deng/South China Morning Post)
items.title_en: Shenzhen-listed Apple supplier Lingyi iTech seeks to raise $1.1B in a June 26 Hong Kong debut, as the electronic parts maker expands into AI hardware and robots (Iris Deng/South China Morning Post)
